wordplay_note: The author in the evening — twilight of alternative history
card_description: Hawthorne Abendsen (meaning "Hawthorne = sin-obsessed author; Abend = evening (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man in the High Castle*. Author of The Grasshopper Lies Heavy who lives in fear of assassination. Name note: The author in the evening — twilight of alternative history. The writer within the writer's fiction who has written the truth. First appears in *The Man in the High Castle*.
first_work: The Man in the High Castle
work_list: The Man in the High Castle

reference.brief: Author of The Grasshopper Lies Heavy who lives in fear of assassination
reference.significance: The writer within the writer's fiction who has written the truth
reference.source_text: The Man in the High Castle
